description: Maps architectural node IDs (as used in MMD/SVG files) to the versions they are present in, when they were introduced, and any changes across versions. Used by the triple-view version selector in explorer.html.

WORLD.change_note: V2: environment is CausalGridWorld (causal attribution tracking) vs GridWorld in V1

E1.change_note: V2: receives post-commit outcome replays from LRN via HPC (separated from E2 planning path)

E2.change_note: V2: pure f(z,a)→z' fast forward predictor; hippocampal planning and rollout separated into HPC (SD-001 fix)

HPC.change_note: V2 new: HippocampalSystems (rollout and provenance) separated from E2 — resolves SD-001 E2/hippocampal conflation

CP.change_note: V2: control plane precision updates (MECH-059) operate on separate timescale from E3 policy decisions

E3.change_note: V2: receives rollout candidates from HPC (separated from E2); commitment boundary validated (MECH-061)

LRN.change_note: V2: post-commit learning now feeds outcome traces to HPC for replay (MECH-061 commitment boundary)
